text: Under MARPOL Annex I, a "Special Area" is geographically defined as an ocean space where:

options.text: No navigation is permitted at any time
Special mandatory methods for the prevention of sea pollution by oil are adopted due to oceanographic conditions
Only military vessels are allowed to discharge bilge water

explanation: A 'Special Area' under MARPOL is a sea area where, due to recognized technical reasons, oceanographic and ecological conditions, the adoption of special mandatory methods for the prevention of sea pollution is required to protect the marine environment.
